business.headline: From TDS mismatches to capital gains errors: 3 risks under Income Tax Act 2025The Income Tax Act, 2025 is now in force, and for many companies, the transition seems smooth so far. But could small gaps like TDS mismatches and capital gains errors turn into bigger compliance issues?

Rupee sinks to record low as oil spike and Fed stance pile on pressureThe rupee slipped to a record low against the US dollar as crude oil prices surged and the Federal Reserve stayed hawkish. The move underlines pressure from India's rising import bill, firmer dollar demand and tighter global financial conditions.

Sensex down 1,200 points: Why is the stock market falling today?The BSE Sensex was down 1,215.91 points, or 1.54%, at 76,280.45 around 10:58 am, while the Nifty 50 fell 366.70 points, or 1.51%, to 23,811.25.
Sensex opens 700 points lower, Nifty below 24,000; IndiGo down 2%The &P BSE Sensex was down 947.08 points to 76,549.28, while the NSE Nifty50 lost 317.60 points to 23,860.05 as of 10:01 am.

JPMorgan asked Vis Raghavan to go, Citi snapped him up for $52 million in 2 daysVis Raghavan moved from JPMorgan Chase to Citigroup's top investment banking role over a single weekend in February 2024. The rapid switch, later detailed by the Financial Times, sharpened attention on his exit and his rising clout at Citi.

Infosys won't cut jobs despite AI shift, says CEO Salil ParekhInfosys CEO Salil Parekh said the company does not plan layoffs despite the AI shift. The stance sets it apart from peers and underscores a hiring-and-reskilling push.

Crude oil tops $120, highest since 2022: What it means for markets and rupeeDisruptions around the Strait of Hormuz, a key oil transit route, have added to the uncertainty, taking crude oil prices to their highest levels since mid-2022.

8th Pay Commission update: Has the last date been extended amid employee demands?The Commission is holding a three-day consultation session from April 28 to April 30. During these meetings, representatives from various employee groups are discussing key issues related to pay, allowances and service conditions.
Oil hits $115: Prices surge to highest since 2022 amid Iran tensionsOngoing tensions around Iran and fears of supply disruptions are pushing crude prices to levels not seen in nearly two years.

Rajiv Bajaj to step down from Bajaj Finance board at end of termRajiv Bajaj's tenure as a non-executive director will conclude at the close of the company's upcoming annual general meeting, in line with regulatory requirements.

Odisha bank case explained: Rules for withdrawing money after deathOnce an account holder dies, the account is no longer treated as a normal account. Any access to funds becomes a claim settlement process, not a simple withdrawal.
Sensex, Nifty end higher as Q4 earnings boost outweighs crude oil surgeSensex ends 609 points higher, Nifty tops 24,100; RIL up 3%

Kissht IPO opens April 30: Price band, GMP, lot size and key detailsThe Rs 925.92 crore IPO will open on April 30 and close on May 5. The allotment is likely to be finalised on May 6, while listing on the BSE and NSE is expected on May 8.

Ganga Expressway opens: How it may reshape real estate and growth in UPThe launch of the Ganga Expressway marks a major moment for Uttar Pradesh. Beyond faster travel, the project is expected to unlock new real estate hotspots and drive economic growth across several cities.

A wealth start-up founder breaks down the Rs 40-crore retirement ruleDezerv co-founder Sandeep Jethwani said on a podcast that a metro retiree may need Rs 40 crore by 60. His calculation hinges on urban inflation, longer lifespans and the gap between nominal returns and real gains.

Health claim denied for late filing? Here's what you need to knowMany policyholders have seen their claims rejected just for missing deadlines, even when the expenses were genuine. However, a recent court ruling brings much-needed relief. Here are the details.

Sensex jumps 1,000 points: What's driving the rally on Dalal Street today?Domestic markets surged on Wednesday, with the Sensex rising over 1,000 points and the Nifty climbing to around 24,318. Gains across auto, banking, IT, energy and consumption stocks pointed to a broad-based recovery in sentiment.

This new form replaces 15G, 15H as PF rules get simpler. What it means for youFor years, EPF subscribers have been used to filing Forms 15G and 15H. That process has now changed. A single new form has replaced both, making PF rules simpler, but what does it mean for you?

The case of the missing workers: How labour law evasion persists in plain sightIn the fifth episode in this series on labour laws and Inspector Raj, this article examines how a 1990 inspection and a 2026 exchange highlight gaps in records, compliance and enforcement.

Quant funds or traditional mutual funds: What works better for Indians today?Quant brings scalability, discipline, and the power of data. Traditional brings context, adaptability, and judgement. As markets evolve and technology gets more deeply embedded in how money is managed, the investors who do well will not be the ones who pick sides.

entertainment.headline: Bellamkonda Sai Sreenivas marries Kavya Reddy in intimate Tirupati temple wedding Bellamkonda Sai Sreenivas married Kavya Reddy in a traditional late-night ceremony at Tirumala. The intimate temple wedding kept the focus on family, faith and the couple's new beginning.

Through love, hope, and surrogacy: Actor Sambhavna Seth announces pregnancy Actor Sambhavna Seth and her husband, actor-writer Avinash Dwivedi, have announced they are expecting their first child through surrogacy. The post comes months after the couple spoke about a miscarriage and several failed IVF attempts.

Exclusive: BTS' long-time producer Pdogg on ARIRANG, BTS 2.0, Grammys In a rare exclusive interview with India Today, BTS' long-time producer Pdogg talks ARIRANG, the group's new era, solo journeys and evolving sound. He also spoke about Grammys ambition.

Rahul Roy reacts to trolls over viral reels: Help me find work if you are concerned Actor Rahul Roy has hinted at financial struggles while responding to the trolling around his recent viral reels. Saying that the reaction was hurtful, he said if people were really concerned, they could help him find decent work to pay his legal bills.

RAFA: Netflix set to serve Rafael Nadal documentary. See premiere date, new poster Netflix has unveiled new posters for RAFA, its documentary series on Rafael Nadal, ahead of the May 29 premiere. The visuals frame the series around endurance, injury, fatherhood and the final stretch of his career.

The Devil Wears Prada 2 critics review: Stylish sequel faces flak for repetitive plot The Devil Wears Prada 2 is heading to cinemas on Friday with critics offering a mixed but largely favourable first response. Reviewers praised the returning cast and fashion-forward spectacle while questioning the film's plot.

Bhooth Bangla, Golmaal or De De Pyaar De: Dash of comedy amps any Bollywood genre Akshay Kumar's Bhooth Bangla is the latest horror hit that successfully blends the scares with comedy. When it comes to instant connect, humour adds to the impact of every other genre, be it action, family drama or more. Think the Golmaal films or De De Pyaar De.

5 reasons why Michael is turning into a global crowd-puller Antoine Fuqua's Michael opened huge despite poor reviews and after production troubles. Nostalgia, hit songs and Michael Jackson's loyal fan base has turned the film into an early box-office force.

Patriot pre-sales: Mammootty-Mohanlal film eyes Rs 25 crore global opening day Mammootty and Mohanlal starrer Patriot has crossed Rs 3.5 crore in Kerala pre-sales ahead of release. The film is also nearing Rs 9 crore worldwide, reflecting strong demand in India and overseas.

Archana Puran Singh's son recovers Rs 87k he'd lost in scam. Here's how family joked Archana Puran Singh's son Ayushmaan Sethi has recovered the Rs 87,000 he said was lost in an alleged credit card fraud. The update came with family banter in a recent vlog.

Aamir Khan, son Junaid twin in MI jerseys at Wankhede Stadium for IPL match Aamir Khan attended the IPL 2026 match between Mumbai Indians and Sunrisers Hyderabad at Wankhede Stadium with son Junaid Khan.

Dhurandhar 2 SFX supervisor says no CGI used for climax blast. Read how they did it SFX supervisor Vishal Tyagi revealed that the climax explosion sequence in Dhurandhar: The Revenge was filmed without the use of CGI, unlike most new films. Read on to know how the challenging sequence was executed.

Ankita Lokhande shares old clip featuring Sushant Singh Rajput and pet dog Scotch Ankita Lokhande shared a throwback video from the sets of Pavitra Rishta, featuring late actor Sushant Singh Rajput along with her pet dog, Scotch.

Lukkhe trailer: Raashii Khanna, King, Palak Tiwari lead musical action drama The trailer of Lukkhe has been released, offering a look at the upcoming musical action drama set in Punjab. Starring Raashii Khanna, King, Palak Tiwari and Lakshvir Singh Saran, the series will stream on Prime Video from May 8.

Shefali Shah's Dance Day video on Sapne Mein Milti Hai is pure 90s nostalgia Shefali Shah shared a candid video of herself dancing to the song Sapne Mein Milti Hai on International Dance Day. The playful post revived memories of the 1998 film Satya and the iconic song.

Lara Dutta recalls Deepika filming Housefull with malaria: She was totally drained Lara Dutta shared that Deepika Padukone was diagnosed with malaria during the shoot of Housefull but continued filming despite battling high fever and exhaustion.

Samantha's birthday with fans goes viral: Themed cake, special photo frame, gifts Samantha celebrated her 39th birthday with fans at a special meet-and-greet. A viral video from the celebration gave a glimpse of the fun, warmth, and heartfelt moments she shared with her admirers.

Revisiting Kyunki's darkest chapter: Akashdeep Saigal, marital rape, Tulsi's horror Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi 2 revisits its darkest past as Akashdeep Saigal returns in a new avatar, stirring old memories and emotions. The intense scenes, led by Smriti Irani's powerful performance, bring back the haunting legacy of a controversial storyline that challenged societal norms two decades ago.

Akshay Kumar's box office secret: Low risk, no Rs 1,000 crore, more profit, repeat Akshay Kumar's release strategy and profit-sharing model is a durable play in a box office trend obsessed with Rs 1,000 crore milestones. But what is this model? Breaking down the actor's style of working in a highly volatile film industry.

general news.headline: Hope they don't have a heart attack: Iran teases US with new weapon as talks stallAs deadlocked talks between the United States and Iran intensify tensions, Tehran has warned it will soon unveil a weapon its enemies may 'get a heart attack' over.

I-PAC director gets bail day after Bengal polls as ED does not oppose pleaA day after the conclusion of the West Bengal polls, the director of Trinamool's political strategist consultancy was granted bail after the ED said it would not oppose his plea.

No OTP, no problem: Ahmedabad gang uses AI deepfakes to bypass Aadhaar checksThe case came to light after an Ahmedabad businessman noticed he had stopped receiving OTPs from his bank for two days. He approached the police after noticing something was amiss.

Poll of polls: DMK in TN, Congress return in Kerala, NDA in Assam, Bengal suspenseA poll of exit polls have predicted a big win for the BJP in Assam and gave the party an edge ahead of the ruling TMC in West Bengal. The polls also suggested that the DMK is likely to return to power in Tamil Nadu, while the Congress-led UDF may make a comeback in Kerala after 10 years.

India pulls off a power miracle. A big thanks to the SunIndia touched an all-time peak power demand without any shortage, and it was solar that stepped up at the most critical hour, supplying nearly 21% of the electricity. This moment underscores a quiet but decisive shift that the sun is no longer just a supplement but a key driver of India's energy resilience.

CBSE Class 12 results likely by May 23, on-screen marking on track: OfficialCBSE said Class 12 results are likely in the third week of May. It also expressed confidence with on-screen marking. The board said evaluation is running on schedule, offering clarity to students awaiting their scores.

JPMorgan asked Vis Raghavan to go, Citi snapped him up for $52 million in 2 daysVis Raghavan moved from JPMorgan Chase to Citigroup's top investment banking role over a single weekend in February 2024. The rapid switch, later detailed by the Financial Times, sharpened attention on his exit and his rising clout at Citi.

Sensex down 1,200 points: Why is the stock market falling today?The BSE Sensex was down 1,215.91 points, or 1.54%, at 76,280.45 around 10:58 am, while the Nifty 50 fell 366.70 points, or 1.51%, to 23,811.25.

African student's 3 Idiots' Chatur-style Hindi speech steals the show at AMU eventThe African student's performance, inspired by a popular scene from 3 Idiots - in which Omi Vaidya's character Chatur Ramalingam delivers a memorably distorted Hindi speech at a college event - saw Ayyubi adopt a similar tone and style as he imagined himself as a student union secretary.

Godrej Industries lays out 2031 growth ambitionsThe purpose statement, 'Crafting tomorrow since 1897', celebrates the Godrej Group's legacy while clearly positioning the new, refreshed Godrej Industries for the future.

Heavy rain pounds Bengaluru; 8 dead in 24 hours, streets turn to riversHeavy rains in Bengaluru triggered a hospital wall collapse, killing seven people and injuring several others. Large parts of the city were flooded, with streets submerged in waist-deep water, disrupting normal life.

Return the Kohinoor: Mamdani says he'd urge King Charles to hand diamond to IndiaNew York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani said he would encourage King Charles to return the Kohinoor Diamond during the monarch's US visit.

Video: Vinod Kambli's Wankhede appearance during IPL match warms heartsIPL 2026: Vinod Kambli made a rare appearance at Wankhede Stadium during Mumbai Indians' match against Sunrisers Hyderabad on Wednesday, acknowledging fans who wished him well. The outing eased fresh health concerns and highlighted the support around the former India batter.

Nepal Airlines shows J&K as part of Pakistan in map, apologises after backlashNepal Airlines apologised after a network map in a recent post showed all of Jammu and Kashmir as part of Pakistan. The image triggered global backlash.

Video: Car flies off hilly road in Himachal after tyre burst, falls into gorgeA speeding car plunged into a deep gorge on the Una highway in Himachal, killing two people. CCTV footage and the preliminary police enquiry suggest a tyre burst may have triggered the fire and crash.

Exit polls favour BJP, but Mamata's appeal and Bengali identity may tighten raceEven as several exit polls have given the BJP an edge in West Bengal, ground sentiment suggests that Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee's personal appeal and Bengali identity factor could keep the contest much tighter than projections indicate.

Saying that the reaction was hurtful, he said if people were really concerned, they could help him find decent work to pay his legal bills.

Piling rig collapse in Mumbai kills cop heading home after workMumbai police constable was killed after a piling rig machine toppled onto him, while he was on his way home, during flyover construction work. Authorities have launched an enquiry and are investigating possible safety lapses at the site.

1 litre of ethanol needs 10,000 litres water: Hidden cost of India's fuel pushIndia's total ethanol production capacity stands at 1,822 crore litres, with a disproportionate share concentrated in already water-stressed states like Delhi and Maharashtra.

Revisiting Kyunki's darkest chapter: Akashdeep Saigal, marital rape, Tulsi's horrorKyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi 2 revisits its darkest past as Akashdeep Saigal returns in a new avatar, stirring old memories and emotions. The intense scenes, led by Smriti Irani's powerful performance, bring back the haunting legacy of a controversial storyline that challenged societal norms two decades ago.

Live: CISCE declares Class 10, 12 results at cisce.orgICSE, ISC Result 2026 Live updates: CISCE has declared the ICSE Class 10 and ISC Class 12 results for 2026, with scorecards now available on the official websites. Students can check the pass percentage and other result details, while those seeking changes in their marks can apply for re-evaluation or improvement exams.

CBSE on-screen marking glitch: Teacher flags delay in result, CBSE respondsAfter a senior teacher flagged possible glitches in CBSE's new on-screen marking system (OSM) during the Class 12 paper evaluation, raising concerns over slower checking and a possible delay in the CBSE Class 12 board results, a CBSE official noted that OSM was on track and the CBSE Class 12 results were expected by the third week of May.

sports.headline: Travishek Blueprint: The simple secret behind IPL's most destructive opening pair IPL 2026: Travis Head and Abhishek Sharma powered Sunrisers Hyderabad's chase of 245 against Mumbai Indians with another explosive opening stand. Their contrasting strengths and uncomplicated method continue to drive SRH's winning run.

Call Klaasen and add him to 2027 World Cup squad, Pietersen tells South Africa IPL 2026: Kevin Pietersen has urged Cricket South Africa to convince Heinrich Klaasen to reverse his retirement, citing his match-winning form for Sunrisers Hyderabad. Klaasen, has been in a sensational form in the IPL scoring 414 runs at a strike-rate of 15741, placing him second in the Orange Cap race behind teammate Abhishek Sharma.

Gujarat Titans hope to erase mistakes of the past vs red-hot RCB GT vs RCB, IPL 2026 preview: Gujarat Titans are set to face Royal Challengers Bengaluru in their reverse fixture on Thursday. GT need to come out of their shell and adapt the modern T20 template if they want to beat a red-hot RCB.

Champions League: Arteta cries foul over VAR call as Arsenal held by Atletico Champions League semi-final first leg: Coach Mikel Arteta hit out after Arsenal's penalty was overturned by VAR in Madrid. He said the decision denied a potentially decisive win.

Bumrah entitled to have a bad IPL season: Kieron Pollard's big message to critics IPL 2026: Kieron Pollard defended Jasprit Bumrah after the Mumbai Indians pacer returned 0 for 54 against Sunrisers Hyderabad at Wankhede Stadium on Wednesday. His remarks highlighted the scrutiny on cricketers as Bumrah's lean IPL 2026 run continued.

Video: Vinod Kambli's Wankhede appearance during IPL match warms hearts IPL 2026: Vinod Kambli made a rare appearance at Wankhede Stadium during Mumbai Indians' match against Sunrisers Hyderabad on Wednesday, acknowledging fans who wished him well. The outing eased fresh health concerns and highlighted the support around the former India batter.

IPL Play of the Day: SRH prove T20 is a bowlers' game too with Wankhede masterclass MI vs SRH, IPL 2026: Sunrisers turned the game at the death, restricting Mumbai Indians to 243 when the home side looked set to cross 260. Ehsan Malinga shone in the final overs, while Travis Head and Abhishek Sharma later laid the foundation for a record chase at Wankhede Stadium on Wednesday.

After teammates, Hardik Pandya snaps at MI fans for supporting opponents IPL 2026: Hardik Pandya has now turned his focus from teammates to the stands, calling out Mumbai Indians fans for backing opposition teams during this season. The MI captain admitted it "hurts" hearing rival chants at Wankhede after another disappointing home defeat.

No respite for MI as 243 not enough against rampant SRH at Wankhede IPL 2026: SunRisers Hyderabad extended their winning run in the Indian Premier League by recording the 4th highest chase in the history of the tournament. Chasing 244, Heinrich Klaasen anchored the SRH innings and took the team over the line in just 18.4 overs on Wednesday.

Is this the end for Suryakumar Yadav? Fans fume over MI star's IPL 2026 slump IPL 2026: Suryakumar Yadav fell for 5 off 5 balls against Sunrisers Hyderabad at Wankhede. His lean run this season has raised concerns over Mumbai Indians' middle order and triggered mixed fan reaction.

IRGC-linked Iran football body chief lands in Canada, sent back hours later Mehdi Taj, the IRGC-linked president of Iran's football federation, was deported from Canada just hours after arriving for this week's FIFA Congress, reigniting debate over Ottawa's tough stance on figures linked to the Iranian regime.

Ayush Shetty, HS Prannoy grab gritty wins as India finish 2nd in group-stageIndia vs China badminton, Thomas Cup: Ayush Shetty and HS Prannoy grabbed gritty wins in their singles matches as India lost 2-3 against defending champions China. India were not clinical enough in their final group stage tie and ended up losing matches in deciding games.

Ryan Rickelton puts SRH bowlers to sword, hits maiden IPL hundredMI vs SRH: Ryan Rickelton provided Mumbai Indians with the perfect foundation to make a comeback in the Indian Premier League. Playing against SRH, Rickelton hit a 44-ball hundred at the Wankhede Stadium.

Kanteerava Stadium turns white after intense hailstorm sweeps BengaluruA sudden hailstorm in Bengaluru turned Sree Kanteerava Stadium white within minutes. Viral videos had fans joking it looked like snowfall in summer.

Rohit Sharma misses 4th straight IPL 2026 match: What's gone wrong hitman?IPL 2026: Rohit Sharma missed his fourth straight IPL 2026 match as Mumbai Indians faced Sunrisers Hyderabad. Hardik Pandya said the opener needs a couple more games, extending uncertainty around MI's batting.

IPL vaping controversy: BCCI ask Riyan Parag to explain his actionIPL 2026: Riyan Parag and Rajasthan Royals will be asked to explain a vaping incident in the dressing room during their IPL clash against Punjab Kings, following a viral video and public backlash. The controversy has overshadowed RR's thrilling win, with the BCCI reviewing the matter amid growing scrutiny over the franchise's conduct this season.

Golfer Vijay Kumar, former India Open champion, dies at 57Veteran Indian golfer Vijay Kumar died of a heart attack in Lucknow at 57. The 2002 Indian Open winner and four-time Order of Merit champion leaves behind a lasting legacy in Indian golf.

AI chip in Sooryavanshi's bat? Iceland Cricket troll Pak expert over bizarre claimIPL 2026: Iceland Cricket mocked Pakistan cricket's claims of 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi using "AI chips" in his bat after his explosive IPL performances. The joke followed a viral comment from Nauman Niaz, sparking widespread online banter as the teenager continues his record-breaking form for Rajasthan Royals.

Sri Lanka Cricket shake-up: Why did its president and entire board resign?Sri Lanka Cricket is set for a major overhaul after president Shammi Silva and the entire SLC board resigned. The government is expected to appoint an interim committee, though the move could draw scrutiny from the ICC given past conflicts over similar interventions.

Badminton Highlights: India finish on a high, Prannoy wins final matchThomas Cup 2026 Highlights, India vs China: India lose to China in the final group-stage tie of the Thomas Cup. HS Prannoy bags a consolation win in the final match of the tie as he beat Lu Guang in a 3-game battle. If India would have shown a little more clinical edge, they might have won this tie and finished top of their group.

FIFA World Cup: Red cards for covering mouth, yellow card suspension rules easedAhead of the FIFA World Cup, the governing body has announced a couple of major changes in rules. The revisions target concealed abuse, protests and time-wasting while reducing yellow-card suspensions in knockout matches.

Time for change? Why KKR should sack Rahane and appoint Rinku Singh as captainIPL 2026: jinkya Rahane's time as KKR captain seems to slowly coming to a halt and the three-time IPL champions need to put all their stock in Rinku Singh. With a change in direction needed, will Kolkata be brave to pull the plug on Rahane?

Luis Enrique, Kompany share laugh after PSG-Bayern thriller in UCL, video goes viralPSG edged Bayern Munich 5–4 in a thrilling Champions League semi-final first leg at the Parc des Princes, taking a narrow lead into the return fixture. Post-match, Luis Enrique and Vincent Kompany's light-hearted exchange went viral, highlighting rare camaraderie amid high-stakes action.

Punjab Kings' bowling woes? Shreyas, coach split on pace attack concernsIPL 2026: Punjab Kings' unbeaten run ended despite posting 222, exposing concerns about their struggling bowling attack. While Shreyas Iyer blamed poor execution, the fast-bowling coach argued conditions were largely responsible and urged patience.

BCCI urged to act after video of Riyan Parag vaping during IPL match sparks backlashIPL 2026, PBKS vs RR: A viral video appears to show Riyan Parag vaping in the Rajasthan Royals dressing room after the Punjab Kings match, triggering calls for BCCI action and renewed scrutiny over team discipline.

Old Babar Azam back? Pakistan star makes bold claim after record PSL centuryBabar Azam hit 103 off 59 balls as Peshawar Zalmi beat Islamabad United by 70 runs in the Qualifier on Tuesday to reach the PSL 2026 final. Babar made a bold claim after winning the Player of the Match award for his second hundred of the season.

Desperate Mumbai hope to break shackles vs resurgent SRH at WankhedeIPL 2026, MI vs SRH: A struggling Mumbai Indians host third-placed Sunrisers Hyderabad on Wednesday, April 29. Mumbai are sweating on Rohit Sharma's fitness as they hope to return to winning ways in the Indian Premier League.

Play of the Day: How the Don arrived and fixed Rajasthan's biggest crisisIPL 2016: Donovan Ferreira stepped up when Rajasthan Royals needed it most against Punjab Kings. The middle order finally delivered, helping them chase 223 and hand Shreyas Iyer's men their first defeat of the season on Tuesday.

I am not old: Yashasvi Jaiswal's hilarious response to Vaibhav Sooryavanshi questionIPL 2026, PBKS vs RR: Yashasvi Jaiswal laughed off being called the senior partner after Rajasthan Royals' successful chase in Punjab on Tuesdady. He praised 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, saying he enjoys batting with the record-breaking teenager.

PSG vs Bayern instant classic: Paris secure slender lead in record-breaking epicChampions League, PSG vs Bayern Munich: In a masterclass of clinical precision and tactical poise, Paris Saint-Germain edged Bayern Munich 5-4 on Tuesday. The historic nine-goal symphony of elite European football leaves the semi-final perfectly balanced ahead of a monumental Munich decider.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.
The power of knowledge: Education's influence on real estate market trendsIn a dynamic sector like real estate, investing in continuing education is not simply an option; it is a requirement.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
